Ben_and_Josh____IMG_1857.MOV.subject_details: The main subjects are two men engaged in an arm wrestling match across a kitchen counter. The man on the right, identified as Josh, has medium-length blonde/light brown hair, a beard, and is wearing a grey t-shirt with a graphic design and sunglasses pushed up onto his head. Throughout the arm wrestle, Josh maintains a determined smile, his face reddening with exertion. After losing, he throws his head back in hearty laughter, his smile wide and joyful, before walking away still laughing. The man on the left, Ben, is bald with a full beard and a black short-sleeved shirt, revealing a tattoo on his right bicep. Ben is also smiling broadly, almost laughing, throughout the match, displaying a confident and ultimately triumphant expression.

visual_timeline.action_description: The video opens with two men, Ben (left) and Josh (right), already engaged in an arm wrestling match on a kitchen counter. Their hands are clasped tightly, and their forearms are pressed against the counter. Ben is smiling broadly, almost laughing, looking directly at Josh. Josh is also smiling, his face showing initial effort as he leans into the struggle, his eyes focused on their clasped hands. The warm sunlight casts a glow on their faces and arms.

The arm wrestling continues with both men exerting significant effort. Ben maintains his wide, confident smile. Josh's smile remains, but his facial expression shows increasing strain, his cheeks slightly puffed, and his face beginning to redden from the exertion. Their arms remain locked in a static, powerful struggle, with neither gaining a clear advantage.

The intensity of the arm wrestle increases. Josh leans further over the counter, his mouth slightly open, still smiling through the effort, his face now noticeably redder. Ben continues to smile broadly, his eyes fixed on Josh, appearing to enjoy the challenge. Their clasped hands move slightly from side to side as they push against each other.

Ben begins to gain the upper hand, slowly pushing Josh's arm downwards. Josh's body is now significantly leaned over the counter, his head closer to the surface, but he still maintains a smile despite the visible strain. Ben's smile remains triumphant and wide as he applies more pressure.

Ben successfully pins Josh's arm to the counter, completing the arm wrestle. Josh's arm is fully down, but he immediately pulls his hand away from Ben's. Both men are still smiling; Ben's smile is one of victory, while Josh's is a good-natured grin of defeat, mixed with relief from the exertion.

Josh immediately stands up straight, throwing his head back and letting out a hearty, joyful laugh. He looks at Ben, still laughing and smiling broadly, then turns to his right and begins to walk away from the counter, still chuckling. A small, dark-colored dog briefly walks into the frame behind him.
Ben stands up straight, still smiling and laughing, watching Josh walk away. He then briefly glances towards the camera with a happy, amused expression before the clip ends.

After putting, Josh begins to walk slowly towards the hole, his gaze fixed on the ball's path. He reaches the hole, bends down, and retrieves the golf ball from the cup. His movements are deliberate and focused as he picks up the ball.

Josh stands upright, holding the ball and putter. He then places the ball back on the green, a short distance from the hole, and bends down again to line up another putt.
